title: Bearer token not included in REST plugin requests
symptom: When using the REST plugin with the 'send credentials' option, the Bearer token is not included in the Authorization header, leading to authentication failures.
root_cause: The 'send credentials' option in the REST plugin is designed to send cookies rather than authentication tokens. This can lead to confusion when users expect the Bearer token to be sent automatically.
fix_steps: Manually add the Bearer token in the headers section of the REST plugin
Ensure that the 'send credentials' option is correctly configured for cookie transmission
agent_instruction: Manually add the Bearer token to the headers in the REST plugin settings.
